Hero.name: Hafiz Hasib Hasan
Hero.subtitle: Learn Quran Online — Tajweed, Hifz, Nazra & Dua
Hero.teachingBadge: Currently teaching students from Italy & worldwide

Landing.aboutDescription: Hafiz Hasib Hasan completed his Hifz-ul-Quran in 2022 from Ashraful Uloom Model Madrasa, Rajshahi. He brings a dedicated, patient, and thorough approach to teaching the Holy Quran to students worldwide.
Landing.teacherQuote: Dedicated to spreading the light of the Quran across the globe.
Landing.coursesSubtitle: Comprehensive Islamic education tailored to your pace. Choose the track that fits your learning journey.
Landing.course1Desc: Master proper pronunciation and recitation rules.
Landing.course3Desc: Fluency training for reading the Quran by looking.
Landing.course4Desc: Learn essential daily prayers and morning/evening Adhkar.
Landing.scheduleSubtitle: Select an available time that works best for you. Timezones are automatically converted to your local time.

Pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that works for you
Pricing.tryFree: ✨ Try your first class FREE — No credit card required

Testimonials.title: What Students Say
Testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by students from around the world
Testimonials.quote1: "My Tajweed has improved dramatically. Ustaz Hasib is very patient and explains everything clearly."
Testimonials.quote2: "Excellent teacher! My children love the classes. Very professional and punctual."
Testimonials.quote3: "The Hifz program is structured perfectly. I can see real progress every week."

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.q1: Do I need any prior knowledge to start?
FAQ.a1: No prior knowledge needed. Classes are available for complete beginners to advanced learners.
FAQ.a2: Classes are conducted via Google Meet or Zoom. You will receive a link after booking confirmation.
FAQ.q3: Can I reschedule or cancel a class?
FAQ.a3: Yes, you can reschedule or cancel up to 24 hours before the scheduled class time.
FAQ.a4: Bangladesh: bKash, Nagad, and debit/credit cards. International: Visa, Mastercard, and PayPal.
FAQ.q5: Is there a free trial class?
FAQ.a5: Yes! Your first class is completely free. No payment or credit card required.
FAQ.q6: What age groups do you teach?
FAQ.a6: All ages welcome — from young children (5+) to adults. Classes are tailored to each student.
FAQ.a7: Classes are available in 30, 45, or 60 minute sessions based on your preference.
FAQ.a8: Currently offering individual one-on-one classes for personalized attention and faster progress.

Footer.rights: © 2025 Hafiz Hasib Hasan. All rights reserved.

auth.registerSubtitle: Join as a student and get started
auth.authSideText: Learn Quran Online with structured lessons and personalized guidance.
auth.registerSideText: Create your account and start your personalized Quran journey today.

learning.title: Start Quran Learning in
learning.subtitle: World-class Quran education from home — easy, effective, and on your schedule
learning.step1Desc: Join a free trial class first. Ustaz Hasib will understand your current level and create the right plan for you.
learning.step2Desc: Choose your preferred time and book weekly classes. Whether in Bangladesh, Europe or America — class happens in your timezone.
learning.step3Desc: Have live classes with Ustaz Hasib on Google Meet or Zoom. Each class includes Tajweed correction, practice and Q&A.
learning.step4Desc: After each class, view your progress in the dashboard. Ustaz adds notes, gives homework and plans next class.
